intro.title: What is FlorenceEGI?
intro.concept: FlorenceEGI is the platform that enables the Digital Renaissance: an ecosystem where art, technology and sustainability meet to create shared value.

items.title: Authenticity
items.before: Widespread counterfeiting, falsifiable paper certificates, uncertain provenance
items.after: Cryptographic digital signature, immutable provenance on blockchain, instant verification

items.title: Artist Royalties
items.before: Artist earns only on first sale, no benefit from resales
items.after: Automatic royalties on every resale, percentages defined in smart contract

items.title: Environmental Impact
items.before: Energy-hungry blockchains, no environmental contribution, greenwashing
items.after: Algorand carbon-negative, integrated EPP, measurable impact

cta.title: Ready for the Digital Renaissance?

hero.label: THE PROTOCOL
hero.title: How It Works
hero.subtitle: FlorenceEGI is not just art. It is an open protocol that different projects "manipulate" to create value in completely different sectors.

protocol.title: EGI is a protocol, not a product
protocol.body1: An EGI is like an empty structure certified on the Algorand blockchain: a neutral container of authenticity, provenance and value. Each project fills it with its own logic.
protocol.body2: The same protocol that certifies a work of art can authenticate a municipal resolution, or be used as a pure trading asset. The protocol is one — the uses are infinite.

manipulators.title: EGI Manipulators
manipulators.subtitle: Each project uses the EGI protocol in its own way. Same standard, radically different purposes.

art.title: Florence ART
art.desc: Transforms artworks, products and physical goods into digital assets tradable on primary and secondary markets. The EGI becomes the certified "digital twin" of the object, with automatic royalties to the creator on every resale.
art.f1: Immutable CoA (Certificate of Authenticity) on Algorand blockchain
art.f2: Automatic royalties to creator: fixed 4.5% on every resale
art.f3: Built-in EPP: automatic environmental quota on every transaction
art.f4: Customisable utility traits: access, rewards, exclusive benefits
art.f5: Permanent Co-Creator: the patron's signature stays on the blockchain forever
art.earn: Creator (4.5% royalty on every resale) + platform + EPP. The secondary market generates perpetual income for the creator.

natan.title: NATAN LOC
natan.desc: Uses EGIs to notarise documents from Public Administrations. A resolution, minutes, an act — once "EGI-ified" it becomes incorruptible: its hash is on the blockchain, its authenticity is verifiable by anyone, forever.
natan.f1: Cryptographic hash of the document on Algorand: impossible to alter without detection
natan.f2: Immediate public verification: anyone can check the authenticity of the act
natan.f3: Anti-hallucination AI RAG (FARO): intelligent searches on municipal documents
natan.f4: Multi-tenant: each Municipality has its own isolated and secure space
natan.earn: The entity (Municipality/PA) pays a SaaS subscription. No trading on documents: no royalties, no transaction fees.

pt.title: Florence PT
pt.desc: "Satellite" EGIs linked to ART physical EGIs, designed exclusively for dynamic trading. Zero fees: neither the platform nor the creator earns from PT. Only the trader earns. The function is to generate volume and visibility for the entire ecosystem.
pt.f1: Zero fees (0%): no platform cost, no royalties to the creator
pt.f3: High-frequency trading to generate liquidity and volume
pt.f4: Marketing function: generates popularity and hype for linked ART collections
pt.earn: Only the trader. Neither the platform nor creators earn from PT. It is a visibility vehicle for the ecosystem, not a profit tool.

thread.title: The Red Thread: what unites everything
thread.item1: ⚡ Algorand Blockchain — all operations happen on Algorand: finality in 4.5 seconds, carbon-negative, cost €0.0001 per transaction.
thread.item2: 🌿 Native EPP — every type of EGI can contribute to verified environmental projects (reforestation, plastic removal, biodiversity).
thread.item3: 🔒 On-chain authenticity — the EGI protocol guarantees immutable provenance verifiable publicly on any browser.
thread.item4: 👁️ Total transparency — no intermediaries, no hidden data: everything is verifiable on blockchain.

future.title: Future Manipulators
future.body: The EGI protocol is open. In the future, new projects will be able to use it to certify anything that deserves permanent authenticity and traceability.
future.item5: Supply chain — physical products with QR/NFC
future.note: The list is limited only by imagination. If it exists, it can be EGI-ified.

cta.title: Ready to use the protocol?
cta.body: Whether you are an artist, a public institution or a trader, there is an EGI manipulator designed for you. Explore the platforms or contact us to learn how to integrate EGI into your project.

technology.algorandFullDesc: Carbon-negative blockchain, 1000 transactions per second, 4.5s finality, pure Proof-of-Stake in under 5 seconds, average cost €0.001 per transaction.

roadmap.title: Development Objectives
roadmap.disclaimer: Indicative roadmap — priorities subject to change

whatWeDo.title: FlorenceEGI is the world's first Asset Market Maker for your assets
whatWeDo.ammkAnalogy: Just as Shopify lets you create a store to sell products, FlorenceEGI gives you the infrastructure to build a marketplace that sells assets — things that don't end with the transaction, but keep generating value over time.
whatWeDo.diffTitle: Product vs Asset: the difference that changes everything
whatWeDo.diffProduct: A product: you sell it, the transaction ends.
whatWeDo.diffAsset: An asset: it keeps generating value after the first sale — automatic royalties, secondary market, certified environmental contribution, appreciation over time.
whatWeDo.diffNote: An asset is not just a work of art. It can be anything capable of generating value: a document, a patent, a contract, a physical product, an idea.

pillars.title: Your asset (Goods)
pillars.desc: Anything born from human ingenuity: physical and digital art, design, music, documents, contracts, intellectual property.

pillars.title: Blockchain record (Invent)
pillars.desc: Certificate of Authenticity (CoA) on Algorand. SHA-256 hash + permanent timestamp. Public QR verification — no login. Automatic 4.5% royalties on every resale.

pillars.title: Environmental impact (Eco)
pillars.desc: 20% of every transaction automatically funds EPP programmes: Appropriate Restoration Forestry, Aquatic Plastic Removal, Bee Population Enhancement.

whatWeDo.coTitle: Who creates, who activates, who holds
whatWeDo.coBody: The work becomes real because someone creates it, recognises it and completes it. The artist generates the form; the patron (Co-Creator) activates it through minting; the Collector becomes its custodian. Every transaction permanently inscribes in the blockchain the names of all who participated.
whatWeDo.note: GDPR by design · MiCA-safe · Euro payments · Zero upfront costs

payments.platformRoleTitle: What the platform does (and does not do)

level1.title: Simple Fiat Payment
level1.subtitle: The Creator has no wallet, the Collector has no wallet
level1.desc: The simplest method. Everything managed by the platform, no blockchain complexity for anyone.
level1.step1: Pays in euros (card, transfer, PayPal) via platform checkout.
level1.step2: Receives payment, mints on custodial wallet, writes anchor hash on-chain and settles royalties automatically.
level1.step4: Receives net proceeds in euros on linked bank account.
level1.noAlgo: No ALGO, no wallet, no gas fees.

level2.title: Collector with Personal Wallet
level2.subtitle: Creator has no wallet, Collector has a non-custodial wallet
level2.desc: The Collector wants true blockchain ownership of purchased EGIs.
level2.step1: Always pays in euros (no crypto required).
level2.step2: Chooses where to receive the EGI: personal wallet (non-custodial) or platform custodial wallet.
level2.step3: If choosing personal wallet, system automatically performs the required ASA opt-in.
level2.step4: Receives net funds in euros on account.

level3.title: CASP/EMI Partner Integration
level3.subtitle: Enterprise Creator, accepts payments via authorized partner
level3.desc: MiCA-safe solution for enterprise platforms handling high volumes.
level3.step1: Relies on an authorized Partner (CASP/EMI) enabled on the platform.
level3.step2: Customers pay on the Partner checkout.
level3.step3: Settlement managed by Partner with MiCA-compliant reporting.
level3.step4: Receives funds via Partner circuit (SEPA, institutional transfer).

walletRedemption.title: Wallet Redemption — EGI Transfer to Personal Wallet
walletRedemption.subtitle: Users wishing to obtain full ownership of their EGIs can request wallet redemption.
walletRedemption.whyPayDesc: The Algorand blockchain requires every wallet that intends to receive an ASA to first perform an opt-in operation. This temporarily locks 0.1 ALGO per ASA.
walletRedemption.formulaDesc: The total redemption cost is determined by the following formula:
walletRedemption.formulaNote: Where N is the number of EGIs owned. The second term is the minimum account balance. Network fees cover opt-in and transfer (~0.001 ALGO each).
walletRedemption.exampleDesc: A user with 50 EGIs will need approximately:
walletRedemption.exampleNote: The actual cost in EUR depends on the market value of ALGO at redemption time.
walletRedemption.step1: Request: User starts the process from the dashboard and sees the calculated cost.
walletRedemption.step2: Payment: The EGILI amount is deducted from the user balance.
walletRedemption.step3: Funding: The platform transfers the required ALGO from Treasury to the user wallet.
walletRedemption.step4: Auto opt-in: The system performs opt-in for each ASA owned by the user.
walletRedemption.step5: ASA transfer: EGIs are transferred from Treasury to the personal wallet.
walletRedemption.step6: Seed phrase delivery: The user sees their secret phrase (25 words).
walletRedemption.step7: Deletion: The encrypted secret phrase is permanently deleted from the database.
walletRedemption.zeroProfitDesc: FlorenceEGI applies no margin or commission. The cost covers only Algorand blockchain costs (minimum balance requirements and transaction fees).
walletRedemption.afterDesc: The wallet becomes fully non-custodial. The user is the sole holder of private keys and can manage their EGIs via any compatible Algorand client.

projects.title: Appropriate Restoration Forestry
projects.description: Deforestation is eroding our planet's green lung at an alarming rate. Every second, we lose vital forest areas the size of a football field. Solution: reforestation projects that are careful and respectful of ecosystems, not just reforesting but maintaining the most vital areas to rehabilitate ecological balance.

projects.title: Aquatic Plastic Removal
projects.description: If we merged all the plastic islands floating in our oceans today, their extent would rival that of a continent. Solution: concrete projects to remove plastic from aquatic environments — a crucial action clearing our seas, lakes and rivers.

projects.title: Bee Population Enhancement
projects.description: Bees, the silent architects of our planet's biodiversity, are in alarming decline. A third of our food depends on their existence! Solution: enhancement of bee populations in our ecosystem of interest to increase their numbers, thus supporting their biodiversity and pollination.

highlights.text: Each transaction leaves an anchor hash on Algorand: on-chain notarization ensures public traceability, not fund distribution (managed off-chain by the PSP)
Every contribution verifiable on Algorand Explorer
Projects selected by APS (not by the company)

ecosystem.subtitle: A circular system where each role feeds the next
